name: Jeb Bush Jr.
subject: What are you doing Saturday night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend,

There's only 3 days left to enter to win lunch with my dad, Jeb, and I'm going to make it even easier for you to throw your name in.

[**If you chip in $3 right now, I 'm going to throw in two tickets to the Marlins game Saturday night.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2042:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

**For those of you keeping score at home, that 's free airfare, a full weekend in Miami (hotel included), tickets to a baseball game, and lunch with my dad for you AND a friend.**

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2043:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

[**If that doesn 't make you want to chip in $3 and automatically be entered, I don't know what will.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2044:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

But time is running out, and unless you enter now, you may miss out, [**so chip in $3 and automatically be entered.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2045:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Thank you, and good luck,

Jeb Jr.

P.S. Friend, I want to put your name on those tickets, so contribute $3 now: [**RighttoRisePAC.org/Join-Jeb-Miami/**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2046:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2047:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=208&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://www.righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb-official-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://righttorisepac.org/join-jeb-miami/). To enter without making a contribution, [click here]( https://righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb/). Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Thursday, April 9, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Wednesday, April 22, 2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Wednesday, April 22, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets (one for the winner and one for a guest of the winner’s choice) within the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,000; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; two tickets to a local event with an approximate value of $1,000; lunch with Honorary Chairman Jeb Bush, with an approximate retail value of $50; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $2,275. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,275. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules]( https://www.righttorisepac.org/lunch-with-jeb-official-rules/). The Sponsor is the Right to Rise PAC. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317.

name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: We weren't going to send this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Team Marco** <[contact@marcorubio.com](mailto:contact@marcorubio.com)>
Date: Fri, Apr 17, 2015 at 6:20 PM
Subject: We weren't going to send this
To: Peter Willis <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)>

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41630179:16608890019:m:1:1349778030:392FF7B964EE1BA63CC1EC0B2996D4A3:r)
---
#
Peter, We were making such good progress towards reaching our first fundraising goal for the Century Fund that we didn’t think we needed to send another message. But the bad news is the donations slowed down. **The good news is there’s still time left.** [ **_Click here to donate now and give us the support we need to reach our goal._** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41630180:16608890019:m:1:1349778030:392FF7B964EE1BA63CC1EC0B2996D4A3:r) Reaching our full funding goal means we’ll be able to tell the right voters about Marco’s vision & plan for the New American Century. It’s the fundamental message of our campaign so we have to get this right. We’ve had such strong momentum this week -- don’t let us end it on a low note. Please, [give now. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41630180:16608890019:m:1:1349778030:392FF7B964EE1BA63CC1EC0B2996D4A3:r) Thanks! -Team Marco
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41630181:16608890019:m:1:1349778030:392FF7B964EE1BA63CC1EC0B2996D4A3:r)

name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: Are you in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Terry Sullivan** <[contact@marcorubio.com](mailto:contact@marcorubio.com)>
Date: Tue, Apr 14, 2015 at 11:15 AM
Subject: Are you in?
To: Peter Willis <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)>

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566600:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)
---
Peter, Since Marco announced his candidacy yesterday evening over 6,000 people have become Day One Supporters. Will you be joining them? **[>> Click here to donate any amount & receive a decal <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566601:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)** **[> > Click here to donate $35 or more & receive a T-shirt <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566602:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)****[> > Click here to donate $100 or more & receive an autographed poster <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566603:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)** **[> > Click here to donate $250 or more & receive a signed photo <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566604:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)** While it’s true we may be months away from the first caucuses, primaries, and conventions, we need all the support we can get today to launch Marco’s campaign with the momentum we need to win! [Please, take a few minutes this morning and show your support for Marco on Day One!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566605:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r) Terry Sullivan Campaign Manager Marco Rubio for President [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566605:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566606:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41566607:16546103492:m:1:1349778030:1DD7DC1898CA36705D45B13733AC8700:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |

name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: Let's chat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee
body:
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Ben Carson iPhone** <[info@bencarson.com](mailto:info@bencarson.com)>
Date: Fri, Apr 17, 2015 at 9:09 AM
Subject: Let's chat
To: Peter Willis <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)>

__
|

Peter,

My team just told me that we are about to cross 50,000 donors to the Carson America Exploratory Committee. Incredible.

I have no idea who our 50,000th donor will be, but I've decided that I'm going to personally call to express my gratitude, and maybe talk a bit about 2016.

If you go to my website now and make a donation, our 50,000th donor might be you.

Here's the link: [www.bencarson.com/explore/landing/bd/page-hf](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27177394:26142301830:m:1:876315805:BF4C728DB7FC549D07064CE3238B4993:r).

Thank you for your continued support as I explore a run for President, and perhaps I will get to speak with you very soon.

Your friend,

Ben
Sent from my iPhone

---

| Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Watch: Our trip to Iowa in 100 seconds
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Hillary for America | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjI1MTE1MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMTM3NjI1S0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

Last week, we kicked off this campaign by driving to Iowa.

It was an incredible trip. I sat down with Iowans and asked them what they really cared about, and heard about their hopes for the future. It was just honest conversation and a whole lot of coffee.

One young woman in Marshalltown told me about learning to run her father's farm. A principal from Cedar Rapids said he's worried about making education a priority for his students. A mother at Kirkwood Community College spoke about the challenges of being in school while raising her daughter.

What I heard over and over again is what motivates me to run for president: Everyday Americans want the opportunity to work hard and get ahead, for themselves and for their children.

I couldn't imagine a better way to begin this race.

**[Here are a few moments from my trip to Iowa](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1MTE1MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMTM3NjI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**. I hope you'll watch this video, share it with your friends, and ask them to get involved by signing up. We need to build a strong organization from the start, and we can't do it without your help: [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1MTE1MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMTM3NjI1S0&mt=1&rt=0) | | | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI1MTE1MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMTM3NjI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjI1MTE1MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMTM3NjI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
**[www.hillaryclinton.com/100-seconds-in-iowa/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI1MTE1MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMTM3NjI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
I'm so grateful to have launched this with people like you by my side. We could not have started off in such a big way without your support, both online and on the road. Today I'm headed to New Hampshire, where I'll have the chance to ask more supporters about their priorities for the future -- you can bet you'll be hearing from me again soon.

Thank you for being a part of this,

Hillary
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI1MTE1MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMTM3NjI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI1MTE1MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMTM3NjI1S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI1MTE1MjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyMTM3NjI1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Hillary for America | Friend -- Last week, we kicked off this campaign by driving to Iowa. It was an incredible trip. I sat down with Iowans and asked them what they really cared about, and heard about their hopes for the future. It was just honest conversation and a whole lot of coffee. One young woman in Marshalltown told me about learning to run her father's farm. A principal from Cedar Rapids said he's worried about making education a priority for his students. A mother at Kirkwood Community College spoke about the challenges of being in school while raising her daughter. What I heard over and over again is what motivates me to run for president: Everyday Americans want the opportunity to work hard and get ahead, for themselves and for their children. I couldn't imagine a better way to begin this race. . I hope you'll watch this video, share it with your friends, and ask them to get involved by signing up. We need to build a strong organization from the start, and we can't do it without your help: | | | | | I'm so grateful to have launched this with people like you by my side. We could not have started off in such a big way without your support, both online and on the road. Today I'm headed to New Hampshire, where I'll have the chance to ask more supporters about their priorities for the future -- you can bet you'll be hearing from me again soon. Thank you for being a part of this, Hillary | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
